esqlQuery.esql:
TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
// user_commits and user_rollbacks are in separate TSDB groups; INCREASE for counter deltas
| STATS delta_commits = SUM(INCREASE(oracledb.user_commits)),
        delta_rollbacks = SUM(INCREASE(oracledb.user_rollbacks))
        BY oracledb.instance.name, host.name
| EVAL total_tx = delta_commits + delta_rollbacks
| WHERE total_tx > 0
// Ratio > 10% signals systematic transaction failures (constraint violations, timeouts)
// Adjust threshold (e.g. 0.05 for 5%) to tune sensitivity
| EVAL rollback_ratio_pct = ROUND(delta_rollbacks / total_tx * 100.0, 1)
| WHERE rollback_ratio_pct > 10
| SORT rollback_ratio_pct DESC
